_note: Built-in composition functions. Reference by name in rule files.

additive.description: All functions map to the same output. The item is indexed by the sum of their outputs. Requires that sum range = n_values of the output dimension.

independent.description: Each function maps to a separate output. Dimensions combine independently to identify the item.

conditional.description: A selector maps one attribute to a regime. The active regime determines which function controls which dimension; all other dimensions take fixed values.

params.selector: object with 'input' (attribute name) and 'map' (list of regime indices, one per attribute value)
params.branches: list of {regime: int, active_fn: str, fixed: {dim_name: dim_idx}}

override.description: A base function determines the item by default. When one specific attribute value is present, the item is always a fixed dimension value regardless of the base.

params.override_attr: name of the attribute whose value may trigger override
params.override_value: the attribute value index that triggers the override
params.override_dim_value: the fixed dimension value index when override fires
